title: Create Easy Villagers Textures
description: This is a Simple resource pack which change the textures in to create texture
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831a07a6648b055ceb5f105954bb61b930b150a7.png)

This is a simple Resource pack to change the easy villagers old normal textures to new enhanced  create edition texture 

And this texture pack used in a popular modpack Create: let's Create 

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94757d1161e8730183de10f95e8a7bde6f04b713.jpeg)
